pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh validation script
Task description and export_result.sh validation script

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Bologna Pasubio SUMO dataset. The expected output file paths are verified as /home/ga/SUMO_Output/utilization_report.txt and /home/ga/SUMO_Output/stopinfos.xml. Independent simulation and analysis of the stopinfos.xml yields the correct metrics: total_stop_events=499, average_dwell_time=20.0, max_single_dwell=20.0, busiest_bus_stop=busStop#26, and longest_total_dwell_vehicle=4_1220.
